svg.text: Click a level below to play... Have fun!

Remember to press Numeric '0' to Test and Save your level Press 0 again to revert back to edit mode. To keep your changes, you MUST remix this project and save it after you make any level changes :)
T - Toggle between Tile Categories S - Switch Tile Subset (sizes & subtypes) D - While over a Tile deletes it Space - Held down while moving mouse pans the screen Click - To place the current Tile Numeric 0 - To save level and toggle play / design modes Green Flag - To go back to the menu, SAVE BEFORE YOU DO THIS!
